topics: Historical Development of Major Advances in HCI: evolution of Human-Computer Interaction (HCI) from early interfaces (such as command-line interfaces) to modern graphical user interfaces (GUIs).Recent Developments and Challenges in Input and Interaction Techniques: Emerging input methods (touch
etc. ) and their impact on user experience
challenges related to designing intuitive and efficient interaction techniques

Tangible and Embodied User Interactions: tangible interfaces (physical objects as input/output devices) and their applications. Embodied interactions that consider the user’s body and movement. Mobile Interactions: Mobile HCI
including design principles for small screens
Augmented and Virtual Reality (AR/VR):AR and VR interfaces
challenges related to AR/VR hardware and software.Game User Interfaces: Game UI/UX design
challenges specific to mobile devices. Interaction Techniques for Special User Groups: Investigate designing inclusive interfaces for users with disabilities (e.g
